title: ficus obscura var. kunstleri
intro: Ficus obscura var. kunstleri, also known as the Kunstler's fig, is a variety of the Ficus obscura species, a type of fig tree native to Southeast Asia. The leaves and fruits of the plant have been traditionally used in medicine, exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Ficus obscura var. kunstleri are said to include the potential to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antibacterial and antifungal properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues.
